scripts.go: npm install && npm run build && npm run init && npm run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:universal: concurrently -k -n server,web -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6" "node apps/server/universal.js" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build && npm run db:setup
scripts.db:init: cd apps/server && npx prisma generate && node scripts/db-init.js
scripts.db:setup: cd apps/server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
